---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible error or unexpected behaviour
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Install dependencies with `pip install -r requirements.txt`
2. Place `dielectron.csv` in `data/`
3. Open notebook / run script `...`
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

Paste the full error traceback or describe the wrong output.

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.4 |
| scikit-learn version | e.g. 1.4.0 |
| XGBoost version | e.g. 2.0.3 |

## Additional context

Add any other context (screenshots, links) that may help diagnose the problem.
